action_mappings.release_location_for_case: release clinical unit location {} for escalation case {}

action_mappings.release_equipment_for_case: release clinical equipment {} from escalation case {}

action_mappings.release_specialist_service_for_case: release specialist service {} from escalation case {}

action_mappings.create_inperson_appointment_with_equipme: create in-person appointment for escalation case {} using inperson appointment slot {} with clinical equipment {} and diagnostic service slot {}
action_mappings.clear_additional_coordination_flag: clear additional coordination flag for escalation case {} with provider {} at clinical unit location {}
action_mappings.assign_coordination_team: assign coordination team {} to escalation case {} with provider {} at clinical unit location {}

action_mappings.finalize_inperson_reservation_with_staff: finalize in-person reservation for escalation case {} using telehealth resource endpoint {} with assistance from scheduling staff {}
action_mappings.confirm_patient_contact_for_session: confirm patient contact for escalation case {} using telehealth resource endpoint {}
action_mappings.confirm_patient_contact_via_channel: confirm patient contact for escalation case {} via patient contact resource {}
action_mappings.reserve_clinical_specialty_for_case: reserve clinical specialty {} for escalation case {}
action_mappings.authorize_specialty_assignment_by_staff: authorize clinical specialty {} assignment for in-person case subtype {} by staff with telehealth case subtype {}

action_mappings_indef.release_telehealth_slot: release a telehealth appointment slot {} from an escalation case {}

action_mappings_indef.reserve_provider_for_case: reserve a provider {} for an escalation case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_provider_for_case: release a provider {} from an escalation case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_location_for_case: reserve a clinical unit location {} for an escalation case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_location_for_case: release a clinical unit location {} for an escalation case {}

action_mappings_indef.release_equipment_for_case: release a clinical equipment {} from an escalation case {}

predicate_mappings.case_assigned_telehealth_slot: {} is assigned to the telehealth appointment slot {}
predicate_mappings.telehealth_slot_allocated: a telehealth slot is allocated for {}
predicate_mappings.inperson_booking_confirmed: the in-person booking for {} is confirmed
predicate_mappings.preferred_specialty_for_subtype: {} is the preferred specialty for the subtype {}
predicate_mappings.specialty_authorized_for_case: {} is the specialty authorized for the case {}
predicate_mappings.telehealth_session_completed: the telehealth session for {} is completed

predicate_mappings.eligible_location_for_case: {} is an eligible location for the case {}
predicate_mappings.eligible_equipment_for_case: {} is eligible equipment for the case {}

preconditions: I can only open an escalation case A if it is not the case that A is open and it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I open an escalation case A, it is the case that A is open

assign_telehealth_slot.description: assign a telehealth appointment slot B to an escalation case A
preconditions: I can only assign a telehealth appointment slot B to an escalation case A if it is the case that A is open and the telehealth slot B is available and B is an eligible telehealth slot for the case A
I can only assign a telehealth appointment slot B to an escalation case A if it is not the case that a telehealth slot is allocated for A
effects: Once I assign a telehealth appointment slot B to an escalation case A, it is the case that A is assigned to the telehealth appointment slot B and a telehealth slot is allocated for A
Once I assign a telehealth appointment slot B to an escalation case A, it is not the case anymore that the telehealth slot B is available

release_telehealth_slot.description: release a telehealth appointment slot B from an escalation case A
preconditions: I can only release a telehealth appointment slot B from an escalation case A if it is the case that A is assigned to the telehealth appointment slot B

I can only release a telehealth appointment slot B from an escalation case A if it is not the case that the in person booking for A is confirmed and it is not the case that the pre visit for A is coordinated
effects: Once I release a telehealth appointment slot B from an escalation case A, it is the case that the telehealth slot B is available

Once I release a telehealth appointment slot B from an escalation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to the telehealth appointment slot B and it is not the case anymore that a telehealth slot is allocated for A and it is not the case anymore that escalation is required for A and it is not the case anymore that in person reservation is pending for A and it is not the case anymore that A is pending previsit and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for previsit and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional coordination

bind_telehealth_endpoint.description: bind a telehealth resource endpoint B to an escalation case A
preconditions: I can only bind a telehealth resource endpoint B to an escalation case A if it is the case that A is open and B is available for telehealth
effects: Once I bind a telehealth resource endpoint B to an escalation case A, it is the case that A is bound to the telehealth endpoint B
Once I bind a telehealth resource endpoint B to an escalation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available for telehealth

unbind_telehealth_endpoint.description: unbind a telehealth resource endpoint B from an escalation case A
preconditions: I can only unbind a telehealth resource endpoint B from an escalation case A if it is the case that A is bound to the telehealth endpoint B
effects: Once I unbind a telehealth resource endpoint B from an escalation case A, it is the case that B is available for telehealth
Once I unbind a telehealth resource endpoint B from an escalation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the telehealth endpoint B

triage_mark_escalation.description: mark an escalation case A for escalation with a telehealth resource endpoint B
preconditions: I can only mark an escalation case A for escalation with a telehealth resource endpoint B if it is the case that A is open and a telehealth slot is allocated for A and A is bound to the telehealth endpoint B
I can only mark an escalation case A for escalation with a telehealth resource endpoint B if it is not the case that escalation is required for A
effects: Once I mark an escalation case A for escalation with a telehealth resource endpoint B, it is the case that escalation is required for A

triage_notify_contact_and_flag_escalatio.description: notify a patient contact resource B and flag an escalation case A for escalation
preconditions: I can only notify a patient contact resource B and flag an escalation case A for escalation if it is the case that A is open and a telehealth slot is allocated for A and B is available for contact
I can only notify a patient contact resource B and flag an escalation case A for escalation if it is not the case that escalation is required for A
effects: Once I notify a patient contact resource B and flag an escalation case A for escalation, it is the case that escalation is required for A and A is pending previsit
Once I notify a patient contact resource B and flag an escalation case A for escalation, it is not the case anymore that B is available for contact

confirm_inperson_reservation_with_staff.description: confirm in person reservation for an escalation case A with a scheduling staff C using a telehealth resource endpoint B
preconditions: I can only confirm in person reservation for an escalation case A with a scheduling staff C using a telehealth resource endpoint B if it is the case that escalation is required for A and a telehealth slot is allocated for A and A is bound to the telehealth endpoint B and scheduling staff available C
I can only confirm in person reservation for an escalation case A with a scheduling staff C using a telehealth resource endpoint B if it is not the case that in person reservation is pending for A
effects: Once I confirm in person reservation for an escalation case A with a scheduling staff C using a telehealth resource endpoint B, it is the case that in person reservation is pending for A
Once I confirm in person reservation for an escalation case A with a scheduling staff C using a telehealth resource endpoint B, it is not the case anymore that A is pending previsit

confirm_inperson_reservation_by_specialt.description: confirm in person reservation for an escalation case A by a clinical specialty B
preconditions: I can only confirm in person reservation for an escalation case A by a clinical specialty B if it is the case that a telehealth slot is allocated for A and B is the specialty authorized for the case A
I can only confirm in person reservation for an escalation case A by a clinical specialty B if it is not the case that in person reservation is pending for A
effects: Once I confirm in person reservation for an escalation case A by a clinical specialty B, it is the case that in person reservation is pending for A
Once I confirm in person reservation for an escalation case A by a clinical specialty B, it is not the case anymore that A is pending previsit

reserve_provider_for_case.description: reserve a provider B for an escalation case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a provider B for an escalation case A if it is the case that A is open and B is available and B is an eligible provider for the case A
effects: Once I reserve a provider B for an escalation case A, it is the case that A is reserved for provider B
Once I reserve a provider B for an escalation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_provider_for_case.description: release a provider B from an escalation case A
preconditions: I can only release a provider B from an escalation case A if it is the case that A is reserved for provider B
effects: Once I release a provider B from an escalation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a provider B from an escalation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is reserved for provider B

reserve_location_for_case.description: reserve a clinical unit location B for an escalation case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a clinical unit location B for an escalation case A if it is the case that A is open and B is available and B is an eligible location for the case A
effects: Once I reserve a clinical unit location B for an escalation case A, it is the case that A is reserved at location B
Once I reserve a clinical unit location B for an escalation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_location_for_case.description: release a clinical unit location B for an escalation case A
preconditions: I can only release a clinical unit location B for an escalation case A if it is the case that A is reserved at location B
effects: Once I release a clinical unit location B for an escalation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a clinical unit location B for an escalation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is reserved at location B

reserve_equipment_for_case.description: reserve a clinical equipment B for an escalation case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a clinical equipment B for an escalation case A if it is the case that A is open and B is available and B is eligible equipment for the case A
effects: Once I reserve a clinical equipment B for an escalation case A, it is the case that A is reserved with equipment B
Once I reserve a clinical equipment B for an escalation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_equipment_for_case.description: release a clinical equipment B from an escalation case A
preconditions: I can only release a clinical equipment B from an escalation case A if it is the case that A is reserved with equipment B
effects: Once I release a clinical equipment B from an escalation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a clinical equipment B from an escalation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is reserved with equipment B

reserve_specialist_service_for_case.description: reserve a specialist service B for an escalation case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a specialist service B for an escalation case A if it is the case that A is open and B is a specialist service available and B is an eligible specialist service for the case A
effects: Once I reserve a specialist service B for an escalation case A, it is the case that A is reserved with specialist service B
Once I reserve a specialist service B for an escalation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is a specialist service available

release_specialist_service_for_case.description: release a specialist service B from an escalation case A
preconditions: I can only release a specialist service B from an escalation case A if it is the case that A is reserved with specialist service B
effects: Once I release a specialist service B from an escalation case A, it is the case that B is a specialist service available
Once I release a specialist service B from an escalation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is reserved with specialist service B

create_inperson_appointment.description: create in person appointment for an escalation case A with a provider C at a clinical unit location D using an inperson appointment slot B
preconditions: I can only create in person appointment for an escalation case A with a provider C at a clinical unit location D using an inperson appointment slot B if it is the case that a telehealth slot is allocated for A and A is reserved for provider C and A is reserved at location D and the in person slot B is available and B is an eligible in person slot for the case A

I can only create in person appointment for an escalation case A with a provider C at a clinical unit location D using an inperson appointment slot B if it is not the case that the in person booking for A is confirmed
effects: Once I create in person appointment for an escalation case A with a provider C at a clinical unit location D using an inperson appointment slot B, it is the case that A has an in person appointment slot B and the in person booking for A is confirmed

Once I create in person appointment for an escalation case A with a provider C at a clinical unit location D using an inperson appointment slot B, it is not the case anymore that the in person slot B is available

create_inperson_appointment_with_equipme.description: create in person appointment for an escalation case A using an inperson appointment slot B with a clinical equipment C and a diagnostic service slot D
preconditions: I can only create in person appointment for an escalation case A using an inperson appointment slot B with a clinical equipment C and a diagnostic service slot D if it is the case that a telehealth slot is allocated for A and A is reserved with equipment C and D is a diagnostic slot available and the in person slot B is available and B is an eligible in person slot for the case A and D is an eligible diagnostic slot for the case A

I can only create in person appointment for an escalation case A using an inperson appointment slot B with a clinical equipment C and a diagnostic service slot D if it is not the case that the in person booking for A is confirmed
effects: Once I create in person appointment for an escalation case A using an inperson appointment slot B with a clinical equipment C and a diagnostic service slot D, it is the case that A has an in person appointment slot B and the in person booking for A is confirmed and A requires additional coordination and A is pending previsit

Once I create in person appointment for an escalation case A using an inperson appointment slot B with a clinical equipment C and a diagnostic service slot D, it is not the case anymore that the in person slot B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is a diagnostic slot available

clear_additional_coordination_flag.description: clear additional coordination flag for an escalation case A with a provider B at a clinical unit location C
preconditions: I can only clear additional coordination flag for an escalation case A with a provider B at a clinical unit location C if it is the case that the in person booking for A is confirmed and A requires additional coordination and A is reserved for provider B and A is reserved at location C
effects: Once I clear additional coordination flag for an escalation case A with a provider B at a clinical unit location C, it is not the case anymore that A requires additional coordination and it is not the case anymore that A is pending previsit

assign_coordination_team.description: assign a coordination team D to an escalation case A with a provider B at a clinical unit location C
preconditions: I can only assign a coordination team D to an escalation case A with a provider B at a clinical unit location C if it is the case that in person reservation is pending for A and the in person booking for A is confirmed and A is reserved for provider B and A is reserved at location C and D is an eligible team for the case A

I can only assign a coordination team D to an escalation case A with a provider B at a clinical unit location C if it is not the case that A is pending previsit and it is not the case that the pre visit for A is coordinated
effects: Once I assign a coordination team D to an escalation case A with a provider B at a clinical unit location C, it is the case that the pre visit for A is coordinated

assign_escalation_team_and_finalize_prev.description: assign an escalation team D to an escalation case A with a clinical equipment B and a specialist service C and finalize the pre visit
preconditions: I can only assign an escalation team D to an escalation case A with a clinical equipment B and a specialist service C and finalize the pre visit if it is the case that in person reservation is pending for A and the in person booking for A is confirmed and A is reserved with equipment B and A is reserved with specialist service C and D is an eligible team for the case A

I can only assign an escalation team D to an escalation case A with a clinical equipment B and a specialist service C and finalize the pre visit if it is not the case that the pre visit for A is coordinated
effects: Once I assign an escalation team D to an escalation case A with a clinical equipment B and a specialist service C and finalize the pre visit, it is the case that the pre visit for A is coordinated and A is pending previsit

complete_previsit_and_mark_ready.description: complete the pre visit for an escalation case A with a provider B at a clinical unit location C and mark it as ready
preconditions: I can only complete the pre visit for an escalation case A with a provider B at a clinical unit location C and mark it as ready if it is the case that the pre visit for A is coordinated and A is pending previsit and A is reserved for provider B and A is reserved at location C
effects: Once I complete the pre visit for an escalation case A with a provider B at a clinical unit location C and mark it as ready, it is the case that A is ready for previsit

Once I complete the pre visit for an escalation case A with a provider B at a clinical unit location C and mark it as ready, it is not the case anymore that A is pending previsit and it is not the case anymore that in person reservation is pending for A and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional coordination

finalize_inperson_reservation_with_staff.description: finalize in person reservation for an escalation case A using a telehealth resource endpoint B with assistance from a scheduling staff C
preconditions: I can only finalize in person reservation for an escalation case A using a telehealth resource endpoint B with assistance from a scheduling staff C if it is the case that A is ready for previsit and the pre visit for A is coordinated and a telehealth slot is allocated for A and A is bound to the telehealth endpoint B and scheduling staff available C

I can only finalize in person reservation for an escalation case A using a telehealth resource endpoint B with assistance from a scheduling staff C if it is not the case that in person reservation is pending for A
effects: Once I finalize in person reservation for an escalation case A using a telehealth resource endpoint B with assistance from a scheduling staff C, it is the case that in person reservation is pending for A

confirm_patient_contact_for_session.description: confirm patient contact for an escalation case A using a telehealth resource endpoint B
preconditions: I can only confirm patient contact for an escalation case A using a telehealth resource endpoint B if it is the case that the pre visit for A is coordinated and in person reservation is pending for A and A is bound to the telehealth endpoint B

I can only confirm patient contact for an escalation case A using a telehealth resource endpoint B if it is not the case that A is pending previsit and it is not the case that patient contact for A is confirmed
effects: Once I confirm patient contact for an escalation case A using a telehealth resource endpoint B, it is the case that patient contact for A is confirmed

confirm_patient_contact_via_channel.description: confirm patient contact for an escalation case A via a patient contact resource B
preconditions: I can only confirm patient contact for an escalation case A via a patient contact resource B if it is the case that the pre visit for A is coordinated and in person reservation is pending for A and B is available for contact

I can only confirm patient contact for an escalation case A via a patient contact resource B if it is not the case that A is pending previsit and it is not the case that patient contact for A is confirmed
effects: Once I confirm patient contact for an escalation case A via a patient contact resource B, it is the case that patient contact for A is confirmed
Once I confirm patient contact for an escalation case A via a patient contact resource B, it is not the case anymore that B is available for contact

reserve_clinical_specialty_for_case.description: reserve a clinical specialty B for an escalation case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a clinical specialty B for an escalation case A if it is the case that patient contact for A is confirmed and B is available and B is an eligible specialty for A
effects: Once I reserve a clinical specialty B for an escalation case A, it is the case that A is reserved for the clinical specialty B
Once I reserve a clinical specialty B for an escalation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

authorize_specialty_assignment_by_staff.description: authorize a clinical specialty C assignment for an in person case subtype A by staff with a telehealth case subtype B
preconditions: I can only authorize a clinical specialty C assignment for an in person case subtype A by staff with a telehealth case subtype B if it is the case that A is open and A is an in person subtype and C is the preferred specialty for the subtype A and B is reserved for the clinical specialty C

I can only authorize a clinical specialty C assignment for an in person case subtype A by staff with a telehealth case subtype B if it is not the case that C is the specialty authorized for the case A
effects: Once I authorize a clinical specialty C assignment for an in person case subtype A by staff with a telehealth case subtype B, it is the case that C is the specialty authorized for the case A

mark_telehealth_session_completed.description: mark telehealth session for an escalation case A as completed using a telehealth resource endpoint B by a scheduling staff C
preconditions: I can only mark telehealth session for an escalation case A as completed using a telehealth resource endpoint B by a scheduling staff C if it is the case that A is open and A is an in person subtype and in person reservation is pending for A and patient contact for A is confirmed and A is bound to the telehealth endpoint B and scheduling staff available C

I can only mark telehealth session for an escalation case A as completed using a telehealth resource endpoint B by a scheduling staff C if it is not the case that the telehealth session for A is completed
effects: Once I mark telehealth session for an escalation case A as completed using a telehealth resource endpoint B by a scheduling staff C, it is the case that the telehealth session for A is completed

finalize_and_close_case_minimal.description: finalize and close an escalation case A with minimal requirements
preconditions: I can only finalize and close an escalation case A with minimal requirements if it is the case that A is a telehealth subtype and A is open and a telehealth slot is allocated for A and the in person booking for A is confirmed and the pre visit for A is coordinated and patient contact for A is confirmed and in person reservation is pending for A
I can only finalize and close an escalation case A with minimal requirements if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I finalize and close an escalation case A with minimal requirements, it is the case that A is closed

finalize_and_close_case_with_specialty.description: finalize and close an escalation case A with a clinical specialty B
preconditions: I can only finalize and close an escalation case A with a clinical specialty B if it is the case that A is an in person subtype and A is open and a telehealth slot is allocated for A and the in person booking for A is confirmed and the pre visit for A is coordinated and patient contact for A is confirmed and in person reservation is pending for A and B is the specialty authorized for the case A
I can only finalize and close an escalation case A with a clinical specialty B if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I finalize and close an escalation case A with a clinical specialty B, it is the case that A is closed

finalize_and_close_case_with_session.description: finalize and close an escalation case A with completed telehealth session
preconditions: I can only finalize and close an escalation case A with completed telehealth session if it is the case that A is an in person subtype and A is open and a telehealth slot is allocated for A and the in person booking for A is confirmed and the pre visit for A is coordinated and patient contact for A is confirmed and in person reservation is pending for A and the telehealth session for A is completed
I can only finalize and close an escalation case A with completed telehealth session if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I finalize and close an escalation case A with completed telehealth session, it is the case that A is closed

action_nl_templates.assign_telehealth_slot: assign telehealth appointment slot {?telehealth_appointment_slot} to escalation case {?escalation_case}
action_nl_templates.release_telehealth_slot: release telehealth appointment slot {?telehealth_appointment_slot} from escalation case {?escalation_case}
action_nl_templates.bind_telehealth_endpoint: bind telehealth resource endpoint {?telehealth_resource_endpoint} to escalation case {?escalation_case}
action_nl_templates.unbind_telehealth_endpoint: unbind telehealth resource endpoint {?telehealth_resource_endpoint} from escalation case {?escalation_case}
action_nl_templates.triage_mark_escalation: mark escalation case {?escalation_case} for escalation with telehealth resource endpoint {?telehealth_resource_endpoint}

action_nl_templates.finalize_inperson_reservation_with_staff: finalize in-person reservation for escalation case {?escalation_case} using telehealth resource endpoint {?telehealth_resource_endpoint} with assistance from scheduling staff {?scheduling_staff}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a entity is also a object

Everything that is a escalation case or a telehealth appointment slot or a inperson appointment slot or a clinical unit location or a provider or a clinical equipment or a telehealth resource endpoint or a patient contact resource or a clinical specialty or a scheduling staff or a diagnostic service slot or a specialist service or a team is also a entity
Everything that is a coordination team or a escalation team is also a team
Everything that is a telehealth case subtype or a inperson case subtype is also a escalation case
